features.name: Checkpoint hook
features.description: PostToolUse.sh counts Edit/Write/NotebookEdit every 5 in HEO_UPGRADE-active projects; session-start.sh resets counter

features.name: Brainstorm skill
features.description: Divergent → convergent ideation; outputs BRAINSTORM.md; prd-creator Step 0 consumption added

features.name: Handoff skill v1.1
features.description: 5-phase session-end ceremony with 4 modes (heo-active/heo-general/meta/anomaly) and 3 tiers (Light/Standard/Advanced)

features.name: Architecture-sketch skill
features.description: Pre-init-project skill; surfaces tech stack, folder layout, alternatives as ARCHITECTURE_PROPOSAL.md

features.name: Init-project enhancement
features.description: Consume ARCHITECTURE_PROPOSAL.md; install language packs into .claude/rules/<lang>.md

features.name: Feature-plan skill
features.description: Live per-feature plan reading Architecture + lessons-learned + instincts + HANDOFF.md

features.name: Verify-stack skill
features.description: Multi-layer review: self-review + security (static+LLM) + cross-model (Gemini); tiered failure modes

features.name: Feature-done enhancement
features.description: Consume verify-report; visual check if UI; record successes (not just failures)

features.name: Reflect skill
features.description: Periodic instinct extraction from failures AND successes; confidence-graded; user confirms before committing

features.name: Project-doctor skill
features.description: Health check: CLAUDE.md size, Architecture.md drift, feature_list.json drift, stale lessons, unused skills

features.name: Confidence tagging
features.description: Cross-cutting convention: [verified]/[high]/[medium]/[guess] tags on framework outputs

features.name: Cost awareness
features.description: Cross-cutting: estimated context size, subagent multiplier, .claude/cost-log.jsonl

features.name: Pre-ship-check skill
features.description: Verify all features pass, unresolved warnings, secrets check, README, deploy target

features.name: Deploy skill
features.description: Deployment command, git tag, rollback info in deploy-history.json

features.name: Monitor skill
features.description: Lightweight deployment reachability check; suggests rollback if broken
